text.title: semantic-tokens-and-modes Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for semantic-tokens-and-modes as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Per-platform deltas (iOS 14px button padding) expressed as inline overrides on a shared token (`"ios": "14px"`)
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Inline platform overrides are invisible to designers in Figma and to linters; use separate platform-prefixed tokens instead.

failure-mode.description: LLM invents token names from a closed enumeration without pinning to the manifest.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Pin the agent to a closed enumeration loaded from the project manifest; reject outputs with identifiers not present in the manifest.

failure-mode.description: Color math regressions are silent: agent emits `oklch()` values that look fine but fail contrast in dark mode.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Always run the mode-validator post-generation; visual inspection is insufficient for contrast in wide-gamut color spaces.

failure-mode.description: Figma Variables REST API uses `tempId` for newly-created variables; agent reuses a stale ID in a dependent operation.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Capture and reuse `tempId` values within the same API call batch; stale IDs create dangling references that are silent until the file is reloaded.

failure-mode.description: Agent reorders Style Dictionary transforms while "cleaning up" the config.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Style Dictionary transforms run in declared order; reordering silently changes platform output. Lock the order in the agent's tooling spec.

failure-mode.description: Agent auto-promotes primitives to semantic layer without human review.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Semantic naming is the one step that adds real human meaning; an auto-promoted name like `color.blue-500-alias` is worse than no semantic layer.
